mapper.sql: id, username, email, academic_id, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, gender, school, bio, created_at, updated_at, academic_id_last_modified,is_deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{newEmail}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id= #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0;

UPDATE users
nickname = #{nickname},
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
email = #{email},
bio = #{bio},
gender = #{gender},
school = #{school},
academic_id = #{academicId}, academic_id_last_modified = #{now},
updated_at = #{now}
WHERE id = #{userId}
AND (academic_id_last_modified IS NULL OR academic_id_last_modified <= #{allowBefore})
AND is_deleted = 0;
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0)

SELECT
FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
